meta.title: IASS - Modern Beauty and Skills Academy
meta.description: A clean academic platform for beauty sciences, professional skills, and trusted learning content.
meta.ogDescription: Explore elegant courses, digital books, and articles designed for beauty and skills education.

hero.title: Build confident skills in beauty science and professional practice
hero.subtitle: Explore structured courses, practical digital books, and focused articles designed for learners in aesthetics, beauty care, and career development.

founder.label: Founder & Lead Clinical Instructor
founder.title: Meet Our Founder
founder.subtitle: Guided by world-class clinical experts and researchers.
founder.name: Dr. Iyas
founder.description: A board-certified neurologist with over 15 years of clinical experience, Dr. Iyas founded IASS to bridge the gap between academic theory and frontline medical practice. He personally oversees and teaches our flagship neuroanatomy courses.

visual.title: Clear learning paths, beautifully presented
visual.description: A calm interface for courses, books, and articles that keeps attention on the content.

courses.description: Structured programs to strengthen beauty knowledge and practical skills.

footer.description: IASS is a modern academic platform for beauty sciences and practical professional skills.

aboutUs.label: Our Mission
aboutUs.title: About IASS
aboutUs.subtitle: Empowering the next generation of medical professionals with peer-reviewed, expert-led clinical resources. We believe that accessibility to high-quality education is the cornerstone of better patient outcomes worldwide.
